payload.claim_text: The proposed 2024 Real Property Disposition Guidelines are substantially the same as those approved last year except for minor changes reflecting organizational updates and revisions to administrative processes.
payload.subject: MTA Real Property Disposition Guidelines

evidence_refs.source_quote: The proposed 2024 Real Property Disposition Guidelines (see Attachment A) are substantially the same as those approved last year except for those minor changes as shown redlined in Attachment A
In March 2023, the MTA Board approved the MTA Real Estate Department's current real property disposition guidelines

payload.claim_text: The proposed 2024 Personal Property Disposition Guidelines have a non-substantive title change and are substantially the same as the 2023 guidelines.
payload.subject: MTA Personal Property Disposition Guidelines

evidence_refs.source_quote: The proposed 2024 Personal Property Disposition Guidelines (see Attachment B) have a non-substantive title change; therefore, are substantially the same as the 2023 guidelines.

payload.claim_text: A request for proposals (RFP) was issued in July 2023 seeking offers for the operation of a high-quality, full-service bar and café located between 46th and 47th streets on the Grand Central Madison Concourse.
payload.subject: Grand Central Madison bar/café RFP

evidence_refs.source_quote: A request for proposals ("RFP") was issued in July 2023 seeking offers for the operation of a high-quality, full-service bar and café ("bar/café") located between 46th and 47th streets on the Grand Central Madison Concourse.

payload.claim_text: A single proposal was received from Tracks Raw Bar & Grill in response to the RFP.
payload.subject: GCMC bar/café proposal

evidence_refs.source_quote: In response to the RFP, a single proposal was received from Tracks Raw Bar & Grill.

tool_args.label: Tracks Raw Bar & Grill Prior LIRR Tenancy

payload.claim_text: Tracks Raw Bar & Grill was a tenant in good standing on the LIRR Concourse in Penn Station for 17 years and only ceasing operations due to the Penn Station concourse improvements.
payload.subject: Tracks Raw Bar & Grill

evidence_refs.source_quote: The owner/operator of Tracks Raw Bar & Grill, Bruce Caulfield, has a long-standing relationship with the MTA and LIRR customers, having been a tenant in good standing on the LIRR Concourse in Penn Station for 17 years

payload.claim_text: An RFP will be issued April 2, 2024, soliciting a master lessee who will be tasked with delivering a high-quality, curated retail offering throughout all of Grand Central Madison. The Tracks Raw Bar & Grill agreement will be assigned to the future master lessee.
payload.subject: GCMC master lessee

evidence_refs.source_quote: Separate from this offering, an RFP will be issued April 2, 2024, soliciting a master lessee who will be tasked with delivering a high-quality, curated retail offering throughout all of Grand Central Madison.

payload.claim_text: The MTAPD is seeking approximately 56,000 square feet to create a centralized police academy facility. MTAPD selected 95-25 Queens Boulevard, Rego Park, Queens and 30-30 Northern Blvd, Long Island City, Queens as the only locations that could potentially satisfy their requirements. The 30-30 Northern Blvd location requires a smaller footprint at a significantly lower cost than the Rego Park location.
payload.subject: MTAPD training facility site selection

evidence_refs.source_quote: The MTAPD is seeking approximately 56,000 square feet to create a centralized facility which will serve as a police academy
MTAPD selected 95-25 Queens Boulevard, Rego Park, Queens and 30-30 Northern Blvd, Long Island City, Queens as the only locations that could potentially satisfy their requirements
